model.name: LTV/CAC ratio by country (TR/NG/EG)
notes: LTV is per monetization-active user (withdrawal-active), so CAC is matched to sheet-paid_active as closest available proxy.
NG/EG currently show 0 KYC submit clicks (Amplitude Mar 14–20). Treat NG/EG CAC and ratios as IF-KYC-UNLOCKED; scaling is blocked until KYC works.

monthly_gross_profit.units: USD per active user per month

gating.note: 0 KYC submit clicks observed (Amplitude Mar 14–20). Treat ratios as hypothetical until KYC is fixed/unblocked.
0 KYC submit clicks observed (Amplitude Mar 14–20). Treat ratios as hypothetical until KYC is fixed/unblocked.

warnings: Paid CAC uses small weekly denominators (paid_active) and is volatile.
LTV is parameterized (scenario-based) due to missing withdrawal volumes, net margin, and cohort retention.
Do not interpret NG/EG payback as achievable until KYC completion is non-zero for new users.
